CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Dismissal Entered Pursuant To Ccp 664.6 And Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's Motion To Vacate Dismissal Entered Pursuant To CCP 664.6 And Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation is Granted. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ajr

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-29-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2013 Continued To Nov-19-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Nov-19-2013 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. ***NOTE: The continued hearing date of Nov-12-2013 given at the hearing was in error. There will be no hearings on Nov-12-2013 in Department 610.*** Proceedings not reported. (610)
